title: malaxis dolichostachys
intro: Malaxis dolichostachys is a species of orchid commonly known as the "spreading malaxis" due to its spreading habit and long stems. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Malaxis dolichostachys can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
